aboutPage.title: Redefining Island Travel
aboutPage.mission: Founded in 2026, Island Drive Rentals brings uncompromising luxury, safety, and transparency to the Greek rental market.
aboutPage.section1Desc1: We believe that the journey should be as remarkable as the destination. Say goodbye to hidden mileage fees, outdated models, and confusing contracts.
aboutPage.section1Desc2: Every vehicle in the Island Drive fleet is maintained to the highest manufacturer standards and refreshed every season. From nimble scooters for Cycladic alleyways to premium SUVs for mountainous ascents, your perfect ride awaits.
aboutPage.whyChooseUsDesc: Experience the difference of a truly premium rental service tailored for modern travelers.
aboutPage.noHiddenFeesDesc: Transparent pricing from day one. Full coverage options available at checkout.
aboutPage.roadsideDesc: Drive with peace of mind. Our support team is active around the clock across all islands.
aboutPage.newModelsDesc: Our fleet consists strictly of late-model vehicles featuring the latest safety tech.
aboutPage.vipDeliveryDesc: Keys handed directly to you at arrivals. Skip the rental desk lines entirely.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Our premium support team is available 24/7 to assist with your rental queries.
contactPage.supportHoursDesc1: Phone support is available 24/7 for active rentals.
contactPage.supportHoursDesc2: For general inquiries or reservations, our administrative office operates Monday–Friday, 09:00 - 18:00 (EET).
contactPage.formDesc: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

successPage.title: Booking Confirmed
successPage.thanks: Thank you for choosing Island Drive Rentals
